manufacturing_locations: United States (California, Nevada, Texas, New York)
supply_chain.dependencies: Dependent on suppliers including single-source suppliers for battery cells and various components. Reliance on Panasonic and CATL for lithium-ion battery cells. Some components are sourced from single suppliers with limited flexibility in changing suppliers.
supply_chain.risks: Supply chain constraints, single-source supplier dependencies, potential production disruptions due to supplier issues, raw material price volatility (lithium, nickel, cobalt, copper), geopolitical disruptions (Red Sea conflict, arson attack at Gigafactory Berlin), port congestions, trade restrictions, tariffs, natural disasters, health epidemics, cyberattacks, labor issues, wars, and supplier insolvency.

regulatory_risks: Vehicle safety regulations and testing requirements (NHTSA, FMVSS compliance)
Self-driving vehicle regulations and restrictions on Autopilot/FSD features
State laws restricting direct vehicle sales and dealer licensing
Environmental, occupational health and safety laws
Climate change regulations and emissions standards
Product material input regulations and post-consumer product requirements
Data privacy and cybersecurity regulations (GDPR, CCPA, China data privacy laws)
Data localization requirements
Battery safety and transport regulations for lithium-ion batteries
Solar energy regulations (net metering, interconnection, electricity sales)
Energy storage regulations and grid participation rules
Tax law changes and international tax regulations (OECD BEPS)
Government incentive changes (IRA, tax credits, rebates expiration or reduction)
Trade policies and tariff changes
Foreign regulatory requirements for vehicle certification and market entry
Antitrust and competition law compliance
Labor and employment regulations
Product liability and recall regulations
Intellectual property and patent regulations
Corporate governance and securities regulations (SEC, DOJ investigations)

sanction_risks: Russia-Ukraine conflict impact (embargoes, regional instability, airspace bans, potential retaliatory actions)
Trade restrictions and tariffs affecting international operations
Red Sea conflict causing shipping diversions and factory shutdowns
